data.title: Travis Perkins Grants 2026 Performance and Deferred Share Awards to Senior Executives
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

The latest update is out from Travis Perkins ( (GB:TPK) ).

Travis Perkins has granted new conditional share awards under its 2026 Performance Share Plan to senior management, including CEO Gavin Slark, CFO Duncan Cooper and company secretary Will Lang, based on an average share price of £5.784. The awards will vest over a three‑year period from 2026 to 2028 subject to performance conditions, with additional post‑vesting holding requirements for the CEO and CFO and dividend equivalents accruing in shares.

The group has also issued deferred share bonus awards under its 2017 Deferred Share Bonus Plan to Duncan Cooper and Will Lang in respect of their 2025 annual bonuses, using an average share price of £6.2136. These grants, which also attract dividend equivalents until vesting, reinforce the company’s pay‑for‑performance and long‑term incentive structure, more closely aligning senior executives’ remuneration with shareholder returns and regulatory transparency requirements under UK Market Abuse rules.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:TPK) stock is a Sell with a £464.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Travis Perkins stock, see the GB:TPK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TPK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TPK is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weakened profitability (net losses in 2024–2025) and a poor technical trend (below major moving averages with negative MACD and low RSI/Stoch). Stronger operating and free cash flow and moderate leverage provide some support, while valuation is mixed due to the negative P/E despite a ~2.28% dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TPK stock, click here.

More about Travis Perkins

Travis Perkins is a U.K.-listed building materials group supplying construction products and services to trade professionals and the broader construction industry. Through its network and branded businesses, it focuses on serving residential and commercial building markets with timber, tools, and related materials across the country.

data.title: Manycore Tech Fully Exercises Over-Allotment Option After Strong IPO Demand
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Manycore Tech Inc. ( (HK:0068) ) has provided an update.

Manycore Tech Inc. has announced the full exercise of the over-allotment option in its global share offering, resulting in the issuance of 24,092,500 additional shares, or about 15% of the initial offer size, at HK$7.62 per share. The new shares, which will commence trading on April 23, 2026, will be used to return stock borrowed from Wintermatch International Limited, bringing the company’s total issued share capital to 1,726,199,340 shares and slightly increasing the public float, signaling strong demand for the IPO and reinforcing market confidence in the stock.

Following the completion of the over-allotment, shares issued under the global offering will account for 10.70% of the company’s enlarged share capital, compared with 9.45% previously. The adjustment reflects a modest dilution of existing holdings but supports liquidity and trading stability in the post-listing period, while another announcement is expected after the end of the stabilization period under Hong Kong securities rules.

More about Manycore Tech Inc.

Manycore Tech Inc., incorporated in the Cayman Islands, is a technology company listed on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under stock code 00068. The company recently conducted a global offering of its shares, targeting international investors through both Hong Kong and overseas tranches to broaden its shareholder base and enhance its capital structure.

See more insights into 0068 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Photocure Challenges Partner Over Unpaid Cevira Milestone After China Approval
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Photocure ASA ( (PHCUF) ) has shared an announcement.

Photocure ASA has moved to enforce a milestone payment linked to the Chinese approval of Cevira, a gynecological product developed by its partner Asieris Pharmaceuticals. Following the grant of a Drug Registration Certificate by China’s NMPA, Photocure invoiced Asieris for an agreed USD 11 million milestone under their license agreement.

Asieris has so far paid USD 6.6 million, arguing that the approved product label in China does not justify the full milestone, a view Photocure rejects as unfounded. The Norwegian company says it will pursue all appropriate measures to secure the remaining amount, signaling a potential contractual dispute that could affect the financial upside from Cevira’s commercial launch in the Chinese market.

More about Photocure ASA

Photocure ASA is a Norwegian specialty pharmaceutical company focused on urological oncology, branding itself as The Bladder Cancer Company. It develops and commercializes photodynamic diagnostic solutions that make cancer cells glow bright pink, improving detection and treatment outcomes for bladder cancer patients worldwide. The company is headquartered in Oslo and listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker PHO.

YTD Price Performance: 0.98%

Average Trading Volume: 88,727

Current Market Cap: NOK1.92B

See more data about PHCUF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Leef Brands Announces Merger to Acquire HIMALAYA Vapor
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Leef Brands ( (TSE:LEEF) ) has issued an update.

On April 14, 2026, Leef Brands, Inc. signed a merger agreement to acquire Standard Holdings, Inc., parent of HIMALAYA VAPOR, a leading California cannabis concentrates brand known for premium full-spectrum cartridges, in a share-and-cash transaction valued at about US$2.5 million, with closing expected on or before April 30, 2026. The deal will make HIMALAYA a wholly owned subsidiary, cancel its existing options and warrants, lock up most merger shares for 12 months, retain key HIMALAYA executives through additional shares and warrants, and is designed to deepen LEEF’s vertical integration, improve margins using low-cost inputs from Salisbury Canyon Ranch, enhance free cash flow, and expand brand distribution across California while adding sales and distribution capabilities for future strategic growth.

Spark’s Take on LEEF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LEEF is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance—persistent large losses, negative equity, and negative free cash flow—despite improving revenue and a smaller loss profile. Technical indicators are mixed/neutral with modest positive momentum signals, while valuation remains constrained by negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on LEEF stock, click here.

More about Leef Brands

LEEF Brands, Inc. is a leading cannabis extraction and manufacturing company operating in California and New York, with a comprehensive supply chain and bulk concentrate portfolio that powers major U.S. cannabis brands. The company also owns Salisbury Canyon Ranch, a large-scale cultivation asset that provides low-cost, clean cannabis inputs to support its vertically integrated growth strategy.

Pan African Resources ( (GB:PAF) ) has provided an update.

Pan African Resources has disclosed that its chairman, Keith Spencer, sold 1,000,000 ordinary shares in the company on 17 April 2026 through on-market transactions on the London Stock Exchange. The shares were disposed of at a volume-weighted average price of about GBP1.57, for a total value of roughly GBP1.57 million.

Following the sale, Spencer retains a direct beneficial holding of 2,000,000 Pan African Resources shares, amounting to approximately 0.0857% of the company’s issued share capital. The transaction was carried out with the necessary clearances and reported in line with EU Market Abuse Regulation and JSE Listings Requirements, providing transparency for investors regarding director dealings.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from JW (Cayman) Therapeutics Co. Ltd. ( (HK:2126) ).

JW (Cayman) Therapeutics has granted 8,040,000 share options and 220,000 restricted share units to 30 eligible employees under its post-IPO equity incentive schemes adopted in 2020. The options, exercisable at HK$2.52 per share from April 20, 2026 to April 19, 2036, and the RSUs follow multi-year vesting schedules tied to individual performance evaluations, with unvested awards subject to lapse under specified clawback provisions.

By linking vesting to annual appraisals and embedding clawback mechanisms, the company is sharpening alignment between employee incentives, long-term shareholder value, and corporate governance standards. The move underscores management’s use of equity-based compensation to retain key talent and support its growth strategy in the competitive biotech sector.

More about JW (Cayman) Therapeutics Co. Ltd.

JW (Cayman) Therapeutics Co. Ltd. is a biotechnology company listed in Hong Kong that focuses on developing and commercializing cell-based immunotherapies. The group operates through its subsidiaries to advance innovative treatments, positioning itself in the high-growth biopharmaceutical sector serving oncology and related therapeutic areas.

data.title: North Energy Investigation Proposal Withdrawn Ahead of Extraordinary Meeting
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from North Energy ASA ( (DE:RN2) ).

North Energy ASA has clarified that a previously announced proposal from shareholder Anti-Gravity AS to initiate an investigation under section 5-25 of the Norwegian Companies Act at an upcoming extraordinary general meeting has been withdrawn. As a result, the notice for the extraordinary general meeting, scheduled for publication on 21 April 2026, will proceed without this additional agenda item, easing potential uncertainty around a formal inquiry into the company’s affairs.

The withdrawal of the investigation proposal removes a potential source of governance tension between the shareholder and the company’s management. This development may reassure investors and other stakeholders by signaling that there will be no immediate, formal scrutiny process affecting North Energy’s corporate operations or strategic focus at the forthcoming meeting.

More about North Energy ASA

North Energy ASA is a Norwegian investment company with roots in the energy sector, focusing on active ownership and value creation in a portfolio of primarily Nordic-listed and private companies. The company operates within the financial and investment industry, targeting opportunities linked to energy and related sectors in the regional market.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from bet at home.com ( (DE:ACX) ).

Bet-at-home.com AG has convened a fully virtual annual general meeting for 29 May 2026, where shareholders will review the already adopted 2025 financial statements and vote on discharging the management and supervisory boards, approving the 2025 compensation report, and appointing Ypsilon Audit GmbH as auditor for the 2026 financial year. The meeting will also decide on precautionary appointment of an auditor for future sustainability reporting under pending EU rules and on electing two new, independent supervisory board members after recent resignations, underscoring a reset of the board’s composition while maintaining virtual participation structures and clarifying extensive procedural rights for investors in line with Germany’s revised corporate law framework.

More about bet at home.com

Bet-at-home.com AG is a Düsseldorf-based online sports betting and gaming provider listed on the regulated market in Frankfurt. The company operates a digital platform targeting retail customers, with a focus on European markets, and relies on virtual channels and investor portals to engage its shareholder base and manage corporate governance processes.

data.title: ICICI Prudential AMC Secures SEBI Settlement on Legacy Real Estate Venture Fund
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Ltd. ( (IN:ICICIAMC) ).

ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company has received a settlement order from the Securities and Exchange Board of India regarding its suo motu settlement application related to the ICICI Prudential Venture Capital Fund – Real Estate Scheme I. The order pertains to the past extensions of the scheme’s tenure, its eventual liquidation in December 2023, and the subsequent surrender and cancellation of the fund’s SEBI registration, effectively closing regulatory proceedings around the winding up of this legacy vehicle.

The real estate scheme, originally launched in 2013 with a four-year tenure and limited extension options, saw multiple extensions through to September 2023, with investors and SEBI kept informed about these changes and the liquidation timeline. By securing a settlement without admitting or denying SEBI’s findings, ICICI Prudential AMC brings finality to compliance issues surrounding this fund, reducing overhang from a closed product as it operates as a listed asset manager and continues to focus on its broader investment offerings.

More about ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Ltd.

ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Ltd. is a leading Indian asset management firm offering mutual funds and alternative investment products to retail and institutional investors. The company manages a range of schemes across asset classes, including venture capital and real estate-focused funds, and is listed on Indian stock exchanges, reflecting its position in the country’s organized asset management industry.

Average Trading Volume: 66,363

Learn more about ICICIAMC stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
